summary: Decompiled the cm/cmsnap module by adding src/melee/cm/cmsnap.c and cmsnap.h, switching obj_files.mk from the assembly object to the C object, and retaining only leftover assembly around labels/symbol cleanup. The C implementation introduces a small static cmsnap_data state struct, implements snapshot state transitions, hooks a GX-linked GObj callback through GObj_SetupGXLinkMax, and exposes only func_800315C8 and func_800316B4 in the new header.
what_changed: Added src/melee/cm/cmsnap.c with implementations for func_800315C8, func_80031618, func_80031640, and func_800316B4.
Added src/melee/cm/cmsnap.h with prototypes for func_800315C8 and func_800316B4.
Changed obj_files.mk so TEXT_O_FILES builds $(BUILD_DIR)/src/melee/cm/cmsnap.c.o instead of $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/cm/cmsnap.s.o.
Modeled module-local storage as static _cmsnap_data cmsnap_data containing two s32 fields and six unused s32 slots.
Implemented func_800315C8 as a state assertion and transition: assert if cmsnap_data.unk0 is not 0, then set it to 1.
Implemented func_80031618 as a completion/result getter: return 0 unless cmsnap_data.unk0 is 5, otherwise reset status to 0 and return cmsnap_data.unk1.
Implemented func_80031640 as a callback with a switch over cmsnap_data.unk0: idle at 0, call func_800122C8 and advance to 2 from state 1, and increment states 2 through 4.
Implemented func_800316B4 to initialize cmsnap_data, create/setup a GObj with func_803901F0 and GObj_SetupGXLinkMax, and initialize snapshot data with func_800121FC.
Updated the remaining assembly label for the callback from local lbl_80031640 to global func_80031640 so assembly references match the new C symbol.
smart_moves: Kept the unknown module state compact and explicit with a file-static struct, preserving the observed storage layout while avoiding overnaming fields without evidence.
Used a switch on the observed status field to express the assembly control flow clearly while keeping unknown state names generic.
Exposed only the externally needed functions in cmsnap.h, leaving internal callback/result helper functions unprototyped in the public header.
Preserved the original assertion text '_p(status) == CmSnapStatus_Sleep', which captures a likely intended semantic name for state 0 without forcing a full enum reconstruction.
Converted the build one object at a time by replacing only cmsnap.s.o with cmsnap.c.o in obj_files.mk.
decomp_lessons: For small state-machine modules, a static struct with conservative unk names can be enough to match and safely document layout before better semantic names are known.
Assertion strings can reveal intended symbolic states; here the assert text indicates a CmSnapStatus_Sleep concept even though the implementation still uses numeric state values.
When a function formerly entered as an assembly label is needed as a callback symbol, promote the label to a global function symbol so C and assembly references agree.
A C callback passed to GObj_SetupGXLinkMax may require matching the apparent callback signature even if its parameters are unused.
Headers should not automatically expose every matched function; keep helper callbacks/internal getters private unless there is evidence of external use.
naming_conventions: New module files use the path and guard naming pattern src/melee/cm/cmsnap.c, src/melee/cm/cmsnap.h, and _CMSNAP_H_.
Unknown functions remain address-based names such as func_800315C8, func_80031640, func_800316B4, func_800122C8, and func_800121FC.
Unknown struct fields use unk0 and unk1, with unused padding/storage represented as unused[6].
The static module object is named cmsnap_data, matching the module name and data role.
The typedef name _cmsnap_data is lowercase and module-scoped in style, but the evidence does not show reviewer discussion about whether that naming was preferred.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Matched the assembly state machine by using integer status values 0 through 5 and fall-through-style grouped switch cases for states 2, 3, and 4.
Matched callback setup by passing func_80031640 directly to GObj_SetupGXLinkMax with priority/link argument 4.
Matched initialization constants in func_800316B4: func_803901F0(0x12, 0x12, 0), func_800121FC(&cmsnap_data.unk1, 0x280, 0x1E0, 4, 0x7D6).
Kept extern declarations for not-yet-decompiled dependencies func_800122C8 and func_800121FC rather than introducing speculative headers.
Assembly cleanup included removing trailing spaces on blr lines and renaming lbl_80031640 references to func_80031640.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that rename func_800315C8, func_80031618, func_80031640, or func_800316B4 to semantic cmsnap names.
Check whether CmSnapStatus_Sleep later becomes an enum or named constant for cmsnap_data.unk0.
Search for later header cleanup replacing extern declarations for func_800122C8 and func_800121FC with proper includes.
Investigate whether cmsnap_data.unk1 is later identified as an image buffer, texture, or snapshot handle initialized by func_800121FC.
